title: Yijing Hexagram 56: Lu (The Wanderer)
description: Hexagram 56 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 56 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Wanderer. Success through smallness. Perseverance brings good fortune to the wanderer.
